framework.name: Challenge Orchestration for Agent Authentication
framework.description: Standardized redirect challenges (3DS2/OTP) completed on trusted credential provider or issuer surfaces. Results propagated to avoid duplicate step-ups. Supports re-entry for human-not-present flows when agents need to escalate authentication.
framework.raw_quote: Challenge orchestration: Standardizing redirect challenges (3DS2/OTP); completing them on trusted credential provider or issuer surfaces; propagating the results to avoid duplicate step-ups; and supporting re-entry for human-not-present flows

source.title: Agent Payments Protocol: Building Verifiable Trust for Agentic ...
